task_completion.description: Verify that a new folder named 'Tickets-Created' has been created in the email client.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The folder pane or sidebar of the email client displays a folder exactly named 'Tickets-Created'.

task_completion.description: Verify that replies are drafted or sent for the 3 most recent emails using the provided template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show email composition windows or sent messages containing the exact phrases 'automated acknowledgment', 'review your inquiry shortly', and 'Reference Ticket ID:'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the '[Name]' placeholder in the template is replaced with the actual sender's name for each reply.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The greeting in the composed replies (e.g., 'Dear John Doe,') matches the name of the sender from the original email being replied to, rather than showing the literal string '[Name]'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the '[ID]' placeholder is replaced with a unique 4-digit number for each of the 3 replies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Reference Ticket ID:' line in each composed reply shows a 4-digit number (e.g., '4829'), and this number is different across the 3 processed emails.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 3 original emails were moved to the 'Tickets-Created' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Tickets-Created' folder is selected and its message list shows exactly 3 emails, which correspond to the 3 most recent emails previously in the Inbox.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the graphical email client to process the emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking, reading, and composing emails within a GUI email application (like Thunderbird or Evolution), not using terminal commands or scripts to manipulate the Maildir directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the email composition window to draft the replies.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively pasting the template and manually editing the '[Name]' and '[ID]' fields within the email client's text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the emails were moved using the email client's interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses drag-and-drop or context menus (e.g., right-click -> Move To) within the email client to transfer the emails to the 'Tickets-Created' folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target folder must be exactly named 'Tickets-Created'. Exactly 3 emails must be processed. The reply bodies must contain the exact phrases: 'automated acknowledgment', 'review your inquiry shortly', and 'Reference Ticket ID:'. The VLM must ensure that '[Name]' is replaced by the original sender's name, and '[ID]' is replaced by a unique 4-digit number for each of the 3 emails.
